description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux Builds that runs on every push to master and github_actions branches and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-20.04 to build Godot with various configurations, including debug and release builds with different float precisions. The job should clone the Godot repository and a module, install dependencies, load and save a scons cache, set up Python, install scons, and compile the project.
